title: AwardsWatch - FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: CINEMATOGRAPHY
text: Michael Bauman's cinematography for One Battle After Another (Warner Bros) is favored to win the Best Cinematography Oscar at the 98th Academy Awards on March 15, 2026. The film has secured the major industry endorsements: ASC, BAFTA, and BSC awards. According to the analysis, when films win both ASC and BAFTA honors, they almost always capture the Oscar—only two exceptions exist in the past 36 years. Sinners (Warner Bros) - Autumn Durald Arkapaw made history as the first woman of color nominated for Best Cinematography and won the most critics awards, though she lacks the crucial ASC support needed for a realistic Oscar path. Train Dreams (Netflix) - Adolpho Veloso. Marty Supreme (A24) - Darius Khondji. Frankenstein (Netflix) - Dan Laustsen. The analysis emphasizes that industry branch support has become increasingly important, making it unlikely for a film without ASC backing to overcome the frontrunner.
